title: Fresh Paintings
description: A Minecraft resource pack that adds 3D paintings and item frames models!
body:
![Fresh Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/815697026ef86493bb2f46625ba44fcd0e5aba44.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1371956415479939173?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/YqKBQtWE9T) [![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCgbhEot28IcFLwTiArTJXeg?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white&label=Youtube&color=FF0034)](https://www.youtube.com/@swip) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/BZUceKlq?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-paintings) [![GitHub followers](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/iamcyberia?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=Github)](https://github.com/iamcyberia)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack gives paintings and item frames in Minecraft a full visual upgrade. Every painting now has its own unique sprite and model when viewed in your inventory, GUI, or hotbar, so you can easily tell which one you're holding without placing it down. By default, the GUI, Item Frames and Ground models will remain 2D, but if you'd rather use the 3D version of those that's possible by using [RespackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)!
[![emberhost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab8a431924048c60b1386c9524ffab14d7be9c12.jpeg)](https://bit.ly/hq2897wdafu) This resourcepack is sponsored by [Ember Host](https://ember.host/). Click on the image above or use the code **"CYBER"** for a 10% discount on your first purchase! Choose [Ember Host](https://ember.host/) to host your Minecraft server and take advantage of their powerful AMD processors and go beyond with excellent prices!
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
![Upcoming Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b6e383aea47901c3b3b0bc3cc4aed78bebacf7.png) Better HMI Animations for HMI 5.2 update
![Extra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af5cdff06b99e6c7ba21ae04072e98688dd2674b.png) Special thanks to [Braytonks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld), who's not only excellent at making stuff, but also in explaining how to! Special thanks to [Hellay](https://modrinth.com/user/Hellay ) for making sprites and textures for some of the items. Special thanks to [Weskerson](https://modrinth.com/user/weskerson) and [Dani](https://modrinth.com/user/tixork) for the core shaders! And [Cubert](https://modrinth.com/user/cubert1), [Pato](https://modrinth.com/user/patovskiz), and [Hellay](https://modrinth.com/user/Hellay) for being my friends :) Last but not least I'd like to thank all testers in my Discord who helped me so much with feedback and finding bugs!
